code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut out = ""
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut first = true

  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_sep = true
      else
        is_sep = false
      end
    end

    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        mut emit = false
        if not have_prev
          emit = true
        else if parsed != prev
          emit = true
        end
        if emit
          if first
            out = "#{parsed}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{parsed}"
          end
          prev = parsed
          have_prev = true
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
